_comment: AccessoryTab Configuration - Controls which accessory slots are enabled and where they map to in the game
_enabledSlots_comment: Array of slot indices (0-7) that are enabled. Remove indices to disable slots.

slotMappings._comment: Maps accessory slots to game inventory slots. Use null for custom accessory-only slots.
slotMappings._format: slotIndex: { type, targetSlot, enabled, displayName, allowedCategories }
slotMappings._types: Options: 'accessory' (custom slot), 'vanilla' (redirect to vanilla slot), 'modded' (redirect to mod slot)

0._allowedCategories_comment: Empty array = allow all items. Use item class names to restrict (e.g., ['Armor', 'Wearable'])

examples._comment: These are example configurations. Copy and modify the slotMappings above as needed.

exampleVanillaRedirect._description: Redirect slot 0 to vanilla back slot (cloak/cape)

exampleModdedSlot._description: Connect to a modded inventory slot from another mod

vanillaSlotReference._comment: Reference of vanilla Vintage Story inventory slots you can redirect to
vanillaSlotReference.notes: Use these names in 'targetSlot' when type is 'vanilla'
